string.description: name of the ClusterConsumer
resource content will be returned as it was at the time of this git hash

list.description: List of Kafka broker addresses to connect to

string.description:
Kafka consumer client name.
If not set defaults to `eda-consumer-${.metadata.namespace}-${.metadata.name}`
Optional CEL expression to filter which messages get processed
Message delivery semantics (optional; defaults to AtLeastOnce)

Offset reset policy controls which messages are sent to the consumer
at (re)connection. One of:
- `latest`: Force offset to latest (skip past msgs)
- `earliest`: Force offset to beginning
- `resume`: Use Kafka's committed offsets

Go template for where to publish the message
defaults to {{ index .msg "path" }}
SASL credetnials
SASL Mechanism
token url for OAUTHBEARER SASL mechanism

single_nested.description: Optional SASL authentication configuration

string.description: Path to a certificate authority file.
The client certificate file location.
The client private key location.

bool.description: If true the client will not verify the server's certificate.

single_nested.description: Certificates files.

string.description:
Secret containing a `tls.crt`, a `tls.key` and a `ca.crt` keys.
Both `tls.crt` and `tls.key` must be present.
If `ca.crt` is not present and `.trustBundle` is not set
the remote server certificate is not verified.

ConfigMap containing a set of trust bundles (key `trust-bundle.pem`) used to
verify the remote server certificates.

single_nested.description: Optional TLS configuration for secure communication

string.description: Kafka topic to consume messages from

single_nested.description: ClusterConsumerSpec defines the desired state of ClusterConsumer

bool.description: Indicates whether the consumer is currently connected to Kafka

string.description: Most recent error message if any
Timestamp of last successful activity
Short message about current state or issue
Kafka topic name

list_nested.description: Last successfully committed offsets for each partition

single_nested.description: ClusterConsumerStatus defines the observed state of ClusterConsumer.

string.description: a comma-separated list of resource fields to fetch/return.  If unspecified, all fields are fetched.  If empty, only key-fields are fetched.
an EQL "where" expression that will be used to filter the set of resources returned.
A label selector string to filter the results based on resource labels. If specified multiple times, the union of resources which satisfy a label-selector will be returned.
Deprecated: a label selector string to filter the results based on CR labels
